name: agent-safety-guards
description: Generic agent-session safety and multi-agent workflow-reliability guardrails for Claude Code. Encodes credential-compromise response (a secret pasted into a session is burned: revoke + reissue with least scope), read-only / investigation immutability (never mutate files, git, auth, or state during a survey), authorization verification (confirm a cited override actually exists before honoring it), no-fabrication discipline (never invent a permission, override, or tool/MCP availability), and reliable subagent fan-out (small sequential waves, null-safe reduce, journaled + idempotent long runs, disjoint file ownership, verify-the-claim). Advisory only — it reasons and reports, never auto-mutates state.
